title: Unmatched double-quote causes problems for FTS3
bug_features_seed: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS fts3;
CREATE INDEX idx_fuzz_fts3 ON fuzz_fts3 USING gin(to_tsvector('english', content));
SELECT * FROM fuzz_fts3 WHERE to_tsvector('english', content) @@ plainto_tsquery('unmatched');
key_bug_features: Unmatched double-quote in FTS3 query handling
